'''sagushu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:seacave|seacave]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-g-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:seacave|seacave]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| sagushu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:sægishith|sægishith]] || [[word:sægishij|sægishij]] || [[word:sægishish|sægishish]] || [[word:sægishi|sægishi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:sagugushuth|sagugushuth]] || [[word:sagugushuj|sagugushuj]] || [[word:sagugushush|sagugushush]] || [[word:sagugushu|sagugushu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:sagushuth|sagushuth]] || [[word:sagushuj|sagushuj]] || [[word:sagushush|sagushush]] || [[word:sagushu|sagushu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:sagufshuth|sagufshuth]] || [[word:sagufshuj|sagufshuj]] || [[word:sagufshush|sagufshush]] || [[word:sagufshuf|sagufshuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:sagushuthu|sagushuthu]] || [[word:sagushuju|sagushuju]] || [[word:sagushushu|sagushushu]] || [[word:sagushuku|sagushuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:sagushuth|sagushuth]] || [[word:sagushuj|sagushuj]] || [[word:sagushush|sagushush]] || [[word:sagushu|sagushu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:sagushuthul|sagushuthul]] || [[word:sagushujul|sagushujul]] || [[word:sagushushul|sagushushul]] || [[word:sagushukul|sagushukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:sagushuthuthu|sagushuthuthu]] || [[word:sagushujuju|sagushujuju]] || [[word:sagushushushu|sagushushushu]] || [[word:sagushuku|sagushuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:sagushuthun|sagushuthun]] || [[word:sagushujun|sagushujun]] || [[word:sagushushun|sagushushun]] || [[word:sagushukun|sagushukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:sagushuthuoro|sagushuthuoro]] || [[word:sagushujuoro|sagushujuoro]] || [[word:sagushushuoro|sagushushuoro]] || [[word:sagushukuoro|sagushukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|ed5025b}}
